# Nivana sorceress arc

Layer: Epic
Priority: Medium
Scenes: Nivana is severed (../../Scenes/Nivana%20is%20severed%20e47f6699ba364855a1690f45c4a72711.md), Nivana seeks out magic lessons (../../Scenes/Nivana%20seeks%20out%20magic%20lessons%20b66b113f567847cd8e223c0db05d63b3.md), Adelle finds Nivana in the Asylum (../../Scenes/Adelle%20finds%20Nivana%20in%20the%20Asylum%20543f59b84b3b4fedb40806663e785071.md), Nivana realizes the Matron was once human (../../Scenes/Nivana%20realizes%20the%20Matron%20was%20once%20human%20c71e5c1901244291aae224c89b89b598.md), Nivana dreams of the market (../../Scenes/Nivana%20dreams%20of%20the%20market%2010252e2499734346a641d22e1d840284.md), Nivana champions anti-magic (../../Scenes/Nivana%20champions%20anti-magic%200a430a0a2ad84e54a4c65463c2e8d4cc.md), Nivana frees Desa (../../Scenes/Nivana%20frees%20Desa%20a8cbab268093498db959e34828eccd5c.md), Nivana stumbles across her uncle (../../Scenes/Nivana%20stumbles%20across%20her%20uncle%205d7cedab43344f0faef5f67730a77c5d.md)

# Overview

The main purpose of this arc is to depict a woman wrestling with her station as a woman, chafing at the leadership of men, and ultimately finding peace and fulfillment through embracing her natural role as a woman.

# Scoping

[Sorceress arc scoping](Nivana%20sorceress%20arc/Sorceress%20arc%20scoping%202ad58e628ba280659ea0ca9389803d3a.md)

# Campaign against magic

[Campaign against magic](Campaign%20against%20magic%20e7a911ec8497468eb29b6238f24b06a4.md) 

# Sister support arc

The original motivation for Nivana turning to magic was in desperation to support her bed-ridden sister.

At one point I discarded that idea but now it is viable again and is more attractive than before.

[Nivana supporting her sister](../../Solutions/Nivana%20supporting%20her%20sister%202aa58e628ba2801bbbdaef7a7af37013.md) 

# Flow

This arc has the following stages:

1. Opposed to magic
2. Embracing evil magic
3. Burned by evil magic
4. Embracing good magic
